return.message: Expiry Date must be greater than or equal to Issue Date

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeInstrument
service-call.in-map:
[ instrumentId: instrumentId, instrumentRef: instrumentRef,
instrumentTypeEnumId: 'IMPORT_LC', businessStateId: businessStateId ?: 'LC_DRAFT', amount: lcAmount, currencyUomId: lcCurrencyUomId, expiryDate: expiryDate, baseEquivalentAmount: lcAmount, customerFacilityId: customerFacilityId ]

log.message: DEBUG: Creating transaction for ${instrumentId} with ref ${transactionRef}

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [ instrumentId: instrumentId, transactionRef: transactionRef, transactionTypeEnumId: 'IMP_NEW', transactionStatusId: 'TX_DRAFT', transactionDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, makerUserId: ec.user.userId, makerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp, amount: lcAmount, priorityEnumId: priorityEnumId ?: 'PRIO_NORMAL', versionNumber: 1 ]

return.message: Applicant and Beneficiary are mandatory for LC issuance
Negotiating Bank is mandatory when 'Available With Bank' is selected

set.from: [ instrumentId: instrumentId, businessStateId: (businessStateId ?: 'LC_DRAFT'), effectiveAmount: lcAmount, effectiveOutstandingAmount: lcAmount, effectiveExpiryDate: expiryDate, effectiveShipmentDate: latestShipmentDate, effectiveCurrencyUomId: lcCurrencyUomId, isRevolving: (isRevolving ?: 'N'), goodsDescription: goodsDescription, documentsRequired: documentsRequired, additionalConditions: additionalConditions, bankToBankInstructions: bankToBankInstructions, additionalAmountsText: additionalAmountsText, chargeAllocationText: chargeAllocationText, shipmentPeriodText: shipmentPeriodText, lcTypeEnumId: lcTypeEnumId, confirmationEnumId: confirmationEnumId, availableByEnumId: availableByEnumId, availableWithEnumId: availableWithEnumId, partialShipmentEnumId: partialShipmentEnumId, transhipmentEnumId: transhipmentEnumId, expiryPlace: expiryPlace, usanceDays: usanceDays, usanceBaseDate: usanceBaseDate, chargeAllocationEnumId: chargeAllocationEnumId, tolerancePositive: tolerancePositive, toleranceNegative: toleranceNegative, maxCreditAmountFlag: maxCreditAmountFlag, latestShipmentDate: latestShipmentDate, portOfLoading: portOfLoading, portOfDischarge: portOfDischarge, receiptPlace: receiptPlace, finalDeliveryPlace: finalDeliveryPlace, mixedPaymentDetails: mixedPaymentDetails, deferredPaymentDetails: deferredPaymentDetails, presentationPeriodDays: presentationPeriodDays ]

return.message: Letter of Credit not found with ID ${instrumentId}

if.condition: (lcAmount != null && lcAmount != lc.effectiveAmount) || (expiryDate != null && expiryDate != lc.effectiveExpiryDate) || (amount != null && amount != instrument.amount) || (currencyUomId != null && currencyUomId != instrument.currencyUomId)

return.message: Cannot modify financial terms of an Issued LC via update. Use Amendment workflow.

log.message: Updating Import LC ${instrumentId}. Transitioning state from ${lc.businessStateId} to ${businessStateId}
Reversing limit for LC ${instrumentId} on state ${businessStateId}. Amount: ${lc.effectiveOutstandingAmount}

return.message: Applicant and Beneficiary are mandatory for LC issuance
Negotiating Bank is mandatory when 'Available With Bank' is selected
Letter of Credit not found with ID ${instrumentId}
User ${approverUserId} is not authorized: ${authOut.reason ?: 'Limit exceeded or Maker/Checker conflict'}

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeApprovalRecord
service-call.in-map: [ transactionId: tx.transactionId, instrumentId: instrumentId, approverUserId: approverUserId, approvalTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp, approvalComments: approvalComments, versionSnapshot: tx.versionNumber, approvalDecision: 'APPROVED' ]

service-call.name: update#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [transactionId: tx.transactionId, transactionStatusId: 'TX_APPROVED', checkerUserId: approverUserId, checkerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

else.message: First approval recorded for Tier 4 transaction. Waiting for second checker.

return.message: Amendments can only be created for Issued or Amended instruments (Current State: ${lc?.businessStateId ?: 'UNKNOWN'})
Concurrent amendment in progress for LC ${instrumentId}

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [ instrumentId: instrumentId, transactionRef: transactionRef, transactionTypeEnumId: 'IMP_AMENDMENT', transactionStatusId: 'TX_DRAFT', transactionDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, makerUserId: ec.user.userId, makerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp, amount: (context.amountIncrease ?: 0) - (context.amountDecrease ?: 0), priorityEnumId: priorityEnumId ?: 'PRIO_NORMAL', versionNumber: 1, relatedRecordId: amendmentId, relatedRecordType: 'AMENDMENT' ]

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [ instrumentId: instrumentId, transactionRef: transactionRef, transactionTypeEnumId: 'IMP_AMENDMENT', transactionStatusId: 'TX_DRAFT', transactionDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, makerUserId: ec.user.userId, makerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp, priorityEnumId: priorityEnumId ?: 'PRIO_NORMAL', versionNumber: 1, relatedRecordId: internalAmendmentId, relatedRecordType: 'INTERNAL_AMENDMENT' ]

return.message: No pending transaction found for amendment ${amendmentId}
Authorization failed: Maker/Checker validation or Authority limit exceeded.

log.message: DEBUG: Accepting amendment ${amendmentId}. Status set to ACCEPTED.
DEBUG: Merging deltas for amendment ${amendmentId} into LC ${amendment.instrumentId}.
DEBUG: Merging deltas for amendment ${amendmentId} into LC ${amendment.instrumentId}. Amount Increase: ${amendment.amountIncrease}, Decrease: ${amendment.amountDecrease}

service-call.name: update#trade.TradeTransaction
service-call.in-map: [transactionId: presTxList[0].transactionId, transactionStatusId: 'TX_APPROVED', checkerUserId: ec.user.userId, checkerTimestamp: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransactionAudit
service-call.in-map: [transactionId: transaction?.transactionId, instrumentId: instrumentId, auditId: auditId, userId: ec.user.userId, actionEnumId: 'AUDIT_HOLD', changedFieldName: 'businessStateId', oldValue: instrument.previousBusinessStateId, newValue: 'LC_HOLD', justificationRootText: 'Compliance Hold applied']

service-call.name: create#trade.TradeTransactionAudit
service-call.in-map: [transactionId: transaction?.transactionId, instrumentId: instrumentId, auditId: auditId, userId: ec.user.userId, actionEnumId: 'AUDIT_RELEASE', changedFieldName: 'businessStateId', oldValue: 'LC_HOLD', newValue: newState, justificationRootText: 'Compliance Hold released']

return.message: Failed to earmark facility for Shipping Guarantee: ${ec.message.getErrorsString()}
Letter of Credit not found for instrument ${instrumentId}
